case_title: PATEL, RAYMOND B. vs. MOORE, PURVIS et al

docket_entries.description: MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, RAYMOND B. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUN-15-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON JUN-22-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

JURY ROOM--JPT LESLIE J. MANN, REPTR JOHN LEWIS--CC SETT CONF--ALL PRESENT. STIPULATED JUDGMENT FOR PLTF FOR POSS WITH STAY OF EXEC TIL NOON ON JUNE 25,1993. DEF TO VACATE BY THEN AND RETURN KEYS TO PLTF. LEASE FORFEITED. PLTF TO PAY DEF $200.00. ALL CLAIMS, COSTS AND ATTY FEES ARE WAIVED BY EACH SIDE AGAINST THE OTHER. PLTF'S PARALEGAL IS TO PREPARE NECESSARY PAPERS.

DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT MOORE, PURVIS

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOORE, PURVIS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 226 6TH ST, #34, S.F, CA., STAYED UNTIL JUN-25-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEF VACATES BY 6-25-93, PL. TO PAY DEF $200. DEF TO SURRENDER KEYS TO PL. SEE FILE FOR DETAILS.
